# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

Next.js frontend project with TypeScript, Storybook + MSW, Vitest, ESLint, Prettier, and Commitlint.

## Stack

- **Framework**: Next.js (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Component Explorer**: Storybook with MSW for API mocking
- **Testing**: Vitest
- **Linting**: ESLint with plugins for Next.js, TypeScript, Storybook
- **Formatting**: Prettier
- **Commit Linting**: Commitlint (conventional commits)

## Checklist

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Scaffold Next.js project
- [x] Add Storybook + MSW
- [x] Add Vitest
- [x] Configure ESLint + plugins
- [x] Configure Prettier
- [x] Configure Commitlint
- [x] Remove boilerplate
- [x] Verify everything works
